examples: Objective: To rationally design new inhibitors of HIV-1 integrase.
Integrase is one of the three enzymes of the irus that is required for iral replication.
Because of the special function of HIV-1 integrase, it has become one of focuses of anti-AIDS drug design.
In 2000 Hazuda and her team published two landmark papers showing that integrase inhibitors could be made.
"Very senior management said I should stop working on integrase and start working on CCR5 inhibitors, " Hazuda says.
